title: Make fixture-mode run repo-clean and export serialization deterministic
problem: research run --fixture-mode dirties the working tree by rewriting committed public export snapshots with non-deterministic key ordering and live timestamps, drifting source_count, and writing generated artifacts into data/ and tickets/improvement_ticket_latest.json.
acceptance_criteria: Running the fixture-mode command twice from a clean tree leaves git status --short empty.
Committed public snapshots match regenerated output byte-for-byte.
Export serialization is deterministic and stable.
Fixture-mode timestamps are deterministic or snapshot-safe.
Improvement ticket artifacts no longer land in the real tickets/ queue directory.
Generated local artifacts are ignored or routed under a gitignored location.
non_goals: No schema migration unless proven absolutely necessary.
Do not implement ticket-035 or later.
